title: RC playtest readiness
summary: Prepare the current post-packet-192 build for real observed playtest sessions without adding new feature breadth.

execution_order.goal: Scope the lane-1 internal RC playtest smoke pass.
execution_order.why_now: The project needs one player-facing proof pass after packet 192 before external sessions begin.

execution_order.goal: Scope the lane-2 playtest kit and observer rubric refresh.
execution_order.why_now: The existing alpha kit predates the current two-lane model and Source-to-Shore beta state.

execution_order.goal: Run the scoped internal RC playtest smoke pass and write findings.
execution_order.why_now: Boot, input, save staging, console health, and handheld UI proof are the immediate player-facing risks.

execution_order.goal: Repair the lane-1 station route readability blocker found during the RC smoke pass.
execution_order.why_now: Observed external sessions should not start while required station route smoke frames have P1 overlap.

execution_order.goal: Update the observer-facing playtest kit and rubric for the current build.
execution_order.why_now: External observers need current instructions, privacy rules, and two-lane triage labels.

execution_order.goal: Review the internal RC playtest smoke report for blockers.
execution_order.why_now: The sprint should not send a broken or confusing build into observed sessions.

execution_order.goal: Review the refreshed playtest kit for clarity, privacy, and science-safe observation.
execution_order.why_now: The observer docs must gather useful evidence without leading children or collecting personal data.

execution_order.goal: Make the final RC playtest readiness decision.
execution_order.why_now: Only a combined proof and documentation review should decide whether external sessions can begin.

avoid: station, route, map, save, or overlay changes

completion_gate: Internal player-facing smoke proof has a report, evidence paths, and severity-ordered findings.
Observer playtest docs are current for the post-packet-192 build and the active two-lane model.
No new feature, route, station page, save schema, traversal system, inventory, combat, planner, or content pack lands.
Any P0/P1 issue discovered during the pass is either fixed in a newly scoped item or blocks external sessions explicitly.
Validation passes after queue or packet updates, and alpha RC status is recorded before final readiness signoff.
guardrails: Do not fabricate child playtest observations.
Do not record identifying child data in this repo.
Do not start a new gameplay expansion from packet 193.
Do not reactivate old external-feedback packets 155 or 156 without real repeated feedback patterns.
Keep findings concrete: what the player sees, how to reproduce it, why it matters, and which lane owns it.

lane_effort.lane-1: high, or xhigh if a smoke blocker touches save, route, station, or overlay behavior

scout_01_contract.decision: Promote a proof-only lane-1 internal RC smoke pass with alpha RC packaging, native browser screenshots, debug snapshot setup, console health, and severity-ordered findings.
required_artifacts: one PNG and one state JSON for each required browser slice
scout_01_contract.blocker_policy: If a P0/P1 issue appears, record reproduction steps and open the smallest explicit blocker item; if no P0/P1 appears, promote ECO-20260515-critic-01.

scout_02_contract.decision: Promote ECO-20260515-main-02 to READY for a docs-only observer kit refresh.
scout_02_contract.scope: Refresh the observer playtest kit, comprehension rubric, and linked snapshot-id notes for the current post-packet-192 RC state.

docs/alpha-playtest-kit.md: Reframe intro from completed alpha arc to current RC/playtest-readiness build while keeping the path stable.
Refresh session slices to include Source Shelter, Forest Release, Dune Catch, and filed Source to Shore closure.
Keep run commands but rename old alpha-RC wording to verified RC/review-drop wording.
Refresh save setup snapshot list with current Source to Shore ids, including Dune Catch.
Collapse four old lane watch labels into the active two-lane model.
Update the session note template and post-session handoff language without claiming real feedback.
docs/playtest-comprehension-rubric.md: Update intro, pairing sentence, and adult setup for the current RC kit.
Add Source to Shore observation anchors and current slice starts.
Generalize filed-route comprehension checks beyond filed High Pass.
Collapse friction-note likely-lane examples into lane 1 and lane 2.
Keep science, memory, emotion, and spatial prompts concrete and non-leading.
docs/save-snapshot-states.md: Update Snapshot IDs only as a linked handoff note so existing Dune Catch debug snapshot ids are documented for observers.

leave_unchanged: privacy rule forbidding identifying child data
warm nudge ladder and adult observer tone
non_goals: station, route, map, save, overlay, or progression changes
new claims of external playtest feedback
verification_expected: npm run validate:agents after queue or packet edits
no build unless runtime code changes

main_01_result.decision: Internal RC smoke found one P1 field-station route readability blocker; keep observed external sessions blocked until after a focused lane-1 repair and after-proof.
passed_checks: Source to Shore active world-map state
filed Source to Shore semantic closure

blocking_findings.title: Field station route frames are state-correct but visually overlapping at native size

main_03_result.decision: The lane-1 RC smoke field-station route readability blocker is repaired; promote ECO-20260515-critic-01 for smoke evidence review.
browser_result: both after-proof PNGs are raw 256x160 canvas captures
station-return-routes-after keeps the route board and support row separated
source-to-shore-filed-station-after keeps the filed Source to Shore board, atlas strip, and support row separated
browser console/page-error collection returned no errors
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts src/test/field-season-board.test.ts -t "field station|Source to Shore station|filed Source to Shore station page|route board|Trail Stride"

critic_01_review.decision: Clear the lane-1 RC smoke gate with no blocking findings after the station readability fix.
findings: The original P1 station route readability issue was valid and is repaired.
After-proof PNGs are native 256x160 canvas captures.
Station-return route board and filed Source to Shore station board remain semantically correct.
The fix stayed inside existing field-station route page spacing/copy density.

summary: Reframed the playtest kit around the current RC build while keeping the legacy file path stable.
Added Source to Shore observer slices through Source Shelter, Forest Release, Dune Catch, and filed closure.
Collapsed observer triage from old lane 1 through lane 4 labels into the active two-lane model.
Preserved privacy guardrails and avoided any claim that external playtest feedback already exists.
Documented existing Dune Catch debug snapshot ids for observer use.
scope_exclusions: station, route, map, save, overlay, or progression changes

critic_02_review.decision: Clear the lane-2 observer-doc gate with no blocker.
findings: Observer docs are usable by a non-developer observer.
Privacy language forbids identifying child data.
Science prompts remain open, relationship-focused, and non-leading.
Old four-lane triage labels are removed from the active kit/rubric.
Source to Shore Dune Catch ready/filed snapshot ids match existing debug snapshot ids and tests.
critic_02_review.lane_status: Lane 2 has no remaining actionable packet 193 item; final readiness signoff remains parked behind lane 1 smoke review.
verification: rg stale-label check returned no matches
rg Dune Catch snapshot id alignment check

critic_03_signoff.decision: Close packet 193 and begin external observed playtest sessions using the refreshed observer kit.
findings: Lane 1 RC smoke proof and station readability after-proof are clean.
Lane 2 observer kit refresh is privacy-safe, current, and clean.
No new feature breadth, route expansion, station page, save schema, traversal system, inventory, combat, planner, or content pack landed for packet 193.
next_move: Begin external observed sessions with docs/alpha-playtest-kit.md.
Use docs/save-snapshot-states.md for debug snapshot staging.
After real sessions exist, synthesize repeated evidence before approving new expansion work.
verification: reviewed lane-1 smoke and after-proof reports

post_packet_path: If clean, begin external observed sessions using the refreshed playtest kit.
If not clean, queue only the smallest blocker fixes before observed sessions.
After real sessions exist, synthesize repeated evidence before approving new feature or route expansion.
